sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-quantized-centered matrix converter. It unpacks the testbench-packed FP32 bus, converts each value to real, applies Q15 scale quantization, clamps to the unsigned quantized range, subtracts the zero point, and emits signed centered integer elements.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_gemm: Combinational signed integer GEMM datapath. It multiplies centered quantized A and B values, accumulates over K into INT32 accumulators, and packs the VLEN-by-VLEN accumulator matrix.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization block. It multiplies each INT32 accumulator by scale_A*scale_B using Q15 scale interpretation and converts the result back to IEEE-754 FP32 bit representation.
